prestazioni: Lamborghini L539 6.5L V12 (naturally aspirated) - Full titanium connecting rods by Pankl Racing Systems (weight reduction of 20% over OEM, optimized for 9,000 RPM redline with reinforced wrist pins and DLC coating for friction reduction).

Custom 102mm throttle bodies by Jenvey Dynamics (replacing OEM 90mm units) with individual throttle position sensors recalibrated via Motec M150 ECU for linear response and 5% improved airflow at high RPM.

Dual Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbocharger conversion (hybrid setup with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducer, and 3D-printed Inconel turbine housings) paired with a custom Akrapovič titanium exhaust manifold (equal-length 1.75" primary tubes) and a secondary wastegate system by Turbosmart (45mm Comp-Gate actuators) for 1.4 bar peak boost, targeting 950 HP on E85 fuel with a custom intercooler setup by PWR (dual-core, 1200hp-rated).
estetica: Novitec Torado SVJ-specific widebody kit (carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards, rear diffuser with active Gurney flap, and extended fenders with 50mm wider track for 20" front/21" rear wheels) paired with a custom Vorsteiner V-FF 107 forged wheel set (20x12 +35 front, 21x15 +50 rear) in gloss black with titanium hardware.

Full carbon fiber engine bay dress-up by Mansory (custom carbon fiber intake plenums, valve covers, and a bespoke carbon fiber strut brace with integrated LED lighting), finished with a custom HRE FF01 wheel center cap engraving of the SVJ's Nürburgring lap time (6:44.97).

Custom PPF (Paint Protection Film) by XPEL Stealth in matte clear, applied to the entire body with a one-off "Aero Weave" texture (inspired by Lamborghini's Forged Composites) and a custom rear wing endplate graphic featuring the SVJ's 770 HP badge in 24K gold leaf.
